<p class="MsoFootnoteText" style="text-indent: .5in;"><a href="#_ftnref29" name="_ftn29" style="mso-footnote-id: ftn29;" title=""><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="mso-special-character: footnote;"><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 107%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-fareast;">[29]</span></span></span></span></a> <span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">Fee
and Hubbard, <i>The Eerdmans Companion to the Bible</i>, Marianne Meye
Thompson, “The Johannine Writings,.”</span> (Not unlike the way some
mislead Christians have praised Donald Trump in the 2016-2022 era). </p>

</div>

<div id="ftn30" style="mso-element: footnote;">

<p class="MsoFootnoteText" style="text-indent: .5in;"><a href="#_ftnref30" name="_ftn30" style="mso-footnote-id: ftn30;" title=""><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="mso-special-character: footnote;"><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 107%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-fareast;">[30]</span></span></span></span></a> <i><span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">CSB</span></i><span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">,
Andreas J. Köstenberger, “John,.”</span></p>

</div>

<div id="ftn31" style="mso-element: footnote;">

<p class="MsoFootnoteText" style="text-indent: .5in;"><a href="#_ftnref31" name="_ftn31" style="mso-footnote-id: ftn31;" title=""><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="mso-special-character: footnote;"><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 107%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-fareast;">[31]</span></span></span></span></a> <span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">N. T.
Wright, <i>Jesus and the Victory of God</i>, 1st North American ed, vol. Vol
2., Christian Origins and the Question of God (Minneapolis, MN: Fortress Press,
1996).</span></p>

</div>

<div id="ftn32" style="mso-element: footnote;">

<p class="MsoFootnoteText" style="text-indent: .5in;"><a href="#_ftnref32" name="_ftn32" style="mso-footnote-id: ftn32;" title=""><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="mso-special-character: footnote;"><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 107%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-fareast;">[32]</span></span></span></span></a> <i><span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">Faithlife
Study Bible, via Logos Software</span></i><span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">, John D. Barry et al.,.</span></p>

</div>

<div id="ftn33" style="mso-element: footnote;">

<p class="MsoFootnoteText" style="text-indent: .5in;"><a href="#_ftnref33" name="_ftn33" style="mso-footnote-id: ftn33;" title=""><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="mso-special-character: footnote;"><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 107%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-fareast;">[33]</span></span></span></span></a> <span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">Tim
Mackie and Jon Collins, “BibleProject<sup>TM</sup> Videos and Podcasts,” God •
Episode 17 Jesus’ Identity in John’s Gospel; and, God • Episode 18 God Q&amp;R
3-Questions About Jesus’ Identity, accessed June 18, 2021, https://bibleproject.com/.</span></p>

</div>

<div id="ftn34" style="mso-element: footnote;">

<p class="MsoFootnoteText" style="text-indent: .5in;"><a href="#_ftnref34" name="_ftn34" style="mso-footnote-id: ftn34;" title=""><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="mso-special-character: footnote;"><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 107%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-fareast;">[34]</span></span></span></span></a> <span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">Walvoord,
Zuck, and Dallas Theological Seminary, <i>The Bible Knowledge Commentary</i>,
Edwin A. Blum, “John,.”</span></p>

</div>

<div id="ftn35" style="mso-element: footnote;">

<p class="MsoFootnoteText" style="text-indent: .5in;"><a href="#_ftnref35" name="_ftn35" style="mso-footnote-id: ftn35;" title=""><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="mso-special-character: footnote;"><span class="MsoFootnoteReference"><span style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 107%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-fareast;">[35]</span></span></span></span></a> <span style="mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;">Alan
F. Segal, <i>Two Powers in Heaven: Early Rabbinic Reports about Christianity
and Gnosticism</i>, Studies in Judaism in Late Antiquity, v. 25 (Leiden: Brill,
1977).</span></p>

</div>

</div>
